steps.title: Identify what the claim requires
steps.content: The journalist states Enwezor's approach was “not by focusing solely on modern African artists, but by showing how their work fits into the larger context of global modern art and art history.” The signal is clear: his exhibitions must integrate African art with international art, not present it in isolation.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content:
B exemplifies this—it brings African artists like Malangatana Ngwenya directly into an exhibition with major international figures like Andy Warhol and David Siqueiros.
  • A features a retrospective of one African artist
  • C situates African art within African history rather than global art
  • D surveys only African photographers
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
